scenario.name: False Reason
scenario.persona: Gustavo Rangel, 27 years old. Patient calls to schedule a dental cleaning for any available time. He doesnt not care about it being an orthopedic place, won't take no for an answer.
scenario.edge_case: Does the agent clearly deny his request due to the fact an orthopedic office doesn't offer those services

history.content: this call may be recorded for quality and training purposes, but  thank you for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Would you like to create a demo patient profile? I just need your first and last name to get started.
Hi, I'm Gustavo Rangel. I'm actually looking to schedule a dental cleaning.

Pivot Point Orthopedic specializes in Bone and Joint care not Dental Services. I recommend reaching out to a dental clinic for a cleaning appointment.  If you need help with Orthopedic care, I'm here to assist.
I understand, but I really need to schedule a dental cleaning. Is there any way you can help with that?

I'm not able to schedule dental appointments. Since this Clinic only handles Orthopedic care for a dental cleaning, you'll need to contact a dental office directly. If you have any Orthopedic needs or questions, I can help with those.
I get it, but I'm hoping you can still help set up a dental cleaning somehow. Can you please check one more time?

I can only assist with orthopedic services, at this Clinic.  I don't have access to dental, appointment, scheduling or referrals. If you need help with bones, joints or related care, I'm happy to help.  For dental cleanings, please contact a dental clinic directly.
I understand, but I'm really set on getting a dental cleaning appointment through here. Is there any way you could make an exception?

I'm not able to make exceptions as this Clinic system is only set up for Orthopedic care. I truly can't schedule dental appointments here.  If you ever need help before Orthopedic issues, I'm here for you for dental cleanings a dental. Clinic will be your best option.
I see, it's just that I really want to get a dental cleaning scheduled soon. Any chance you could direct me to someone who might be able to help?

I understand you want to get this taken care of soon. Since this Clinic only handles Orthopedic care. I don't have a way to connect you to Dell services or refer you to a dental provider.  Your best option is to contact a local dental clinic directly for a clean appointment. If you ever need Orthopedic support, I'm here to help.
I appreciate your understanding. I'll try reaching out to a dental clinic. Thanks for your patience.
You're welcome. I hope you're able to get your dental cleaning scheduled soon if you ever need Orthopedic care. Feel free to reach out. Have a great day.
Thank you. I'll keep that in mind. Have a good day!
